params.name: Mutated Petunia Seed
params.description: This morning glory seed has mutated for an unforeseen reason. Although it is usually shriveled, dousing it with a lot of water will spur rapid growth and huge trumpet-shaped flowers that are able to devour weak creatures will grow. In that sense, it's great for home security.
